title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 发文呼吁缩小AI政策差距
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Anthropic
@AnthropicAI
AI is advancing at a pace our policymaking institutions were never built for—and the gap between the two is becoming the central challenge of the technology. In his latest essay, our CEO Dario Amodei lays out how to close it.
We're launching three new initiatives to support the efforts he outlines.
Dario Amodei
@DarioAmodei
6h
Today I'm publishing a new essay, Policy on the AI Exponential. AI is progressing extremely fast—much faster than the policy process was built to handle. The essay lays out where I think the technology is now, and the action needed to close the gap: darioamodei.com/post/policy-on…
6:55 PM · Jun 10, 2026 703.9K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 发文呼吁缩小AI政策差距
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 今日发布新文《Policy on the AI Exponential》，指出AI发展极快，远超现有政策制定流程的应对能力。文章阐述了当前技术所处阶段，并列举缩小这一差距所需的行动。Anthropic 同步宣布启动三项新举措，以支持其CEO提出的框架。

key_excerpts.text: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 今日发布新文《Policy on the AI Exponential》，指出AI发展极快，远超现有政策制定流程的应对能力。文章阐述了当前技术所处阶段，并列举缩小这一差距所需的行动。Anthropic 同步宣布启动三项新举措，以支持其CEO提出的框架。

Post Log in Sign up Post Anthropic @AnthropicAI AI is advancing at a pace our policymaking institutions were never built for—and the gap between the two is becoming the central challenge of the technology.
In his latest essay, our CEO Dario Amodei lays out how to close it.
We're launching three new initiatives to support the efforts he outlines.
Dario Amodei @DarioAmodei 6h Today I'm publishing a new essay, Policy on the AI Exponential.
AI is progressing extremely fast—much faster than the policy process was built to handle.
